data.summary: Insufficient evidence to validate the requirement for milestone-based billing.
data.assessment: The exploratory step requires validation of the specific need for milestone-based billing (% complete invoicing). However, the evidence provided does not include any concrete API reads or persisted state checks that directly address this requirement. The only related evidence pertains to general functionality without confirming the specific need, leading to an inconclusive status.
gaps: No evidence of milestone-based billing being validated.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence for milestone-based billing
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify the milestone-based billing requirement.
